_dataset_notice: CURATED SEED DATASET: All scholarship entries in this file are real, nationally available US programs from identifiable sponsoring organizations. Every field must be independently verified before production use. Fields marked VERIFY are intentionally incomplete placeholders. Do not show VERIFY values to end users without review.

scholarships.name: Coca-Cola Scholars Program
scholarships.description: Merit-based scholarship for high school seniors planning to pursue postsecondary education. Recognizes leadership, service, and academic achievement.

scholarships.name: The Gates Scholarship
scholarships.description: Highly selective last-dollar scholarship for outstanding minority high school seniors from low-income households. Covers full cost of attendance not already met by financial aid.

scholarships.name: Jack Kent Cooke Foundation College Scholarship Program
scholarships.description: Supports high-achieving high school seniors with financial need who seek to attend the nation's best four-year colleges and universities.

scholarships.name: Dell Scholars Program
scholarships.description: College readiness and completion program for students who demonstrate grit, potential, and financial need. Includes scholarship funds and individualized support.

scholarships.name: Horatio Alger National Scholarship
scholarships.sponsor: Horatio Alger Association of Distinguished Americans
scholarships.description: Awarded to high school seniors who have faced and overcome significant obstacles, demonstrate financial need, and are committed to pursuing higher education.

scholarships.name: Davidson Fellows Scholarship
scholarships.description: Recognizes students 18 or younger who have completed significant projects in science, technology, engineering, mathematics, literature, music, philosophy, or outside the box.

scholarships.name: Regeneron Science Talent Search
scholarships.award_amount: VERIFY (tiered competition awards up to $250000 for top prize)
scholarships.description: Premier science and math competition for high school seniors conducting original research. Students submit research reports and compete for awards at the national level.

scholarships.name: National Merit Scholarship Program
scholarships.description: Academic competition entered by taking the PSAT/NMSQT in the designated year of high school. Semifinalists and finalists compete for National Merit and corporate-sponsored scholarships.

scholarships.name: Burger King Scholars Program
scholarships.description: Merit-based awards for high school seniors, Burger King employees, and their families who plan to enroll in accredited two- or four-year colleges.

scholarships.name: Elks Most Valuable Student Scholarship
scholarships.description: Four-year scholarships for high school seniors based on scholarship, leadership, and financial need. Funded by the Elks National Foundation.

scholarships.name: Ron Brown Scholar Program
scholarships.description: Scholarship and leadership development for academically talented African American high school seniors with demonstrated leadership, community service, and financial need.

scholarships.name: Hispanic Scholarship Fund Scholar Program
scholarships.description: Scholarships for students of Hispanic heritage pursuing higher education. Open to high school seniors and current college students.

scholarships.name: QuestBridge National College Match
scholarships.award_amount: full four-year scholarship to partner college (varies by school)
scholarships.description: Connects high-achieving, low-income high school seniors with full four-year scholarships at QuestBridge partner colleges through a national matching process.

scholarships.name: Foot Locker Scholar Athletes Program
scholarships.description: Honors student-athletes who demonstrate exceptional academic ability, strong leadership skills, and passionate community involvement.

scholarships.name: Cameron Impact Scholarship
scholarships.award_amount: full tuition and qualified educational expenses
scholarships.description: Merit-based scholarship for high school seniors who demonstrate excellence in academics, extracurricular activities, leadership, and community service.

scholarships.name: APIA Scholars Program
scholarships.sponsor: Asian & Pacific Islander American Scholarship Fund
scholarships.description: Scholarships for Asian American and Pacific Islander students with financial need who are enrolling or continuing at accredited U.S. postsecondary institutions.

scholarships.name: POSSE Foundation Scholars Program
scholarships.award_amount: full-tuition leadership scholarship at partner college
scholarships.description: Leadership development program that selects diverse cohorts of public high school students and sends them to partner colleges with full-tuition scholarships.

scholarships.name: Barry Goldwater Scholarship
scholarships.sponsor: Barry Goldwater Scholarship and Excellence in Education Foundation
scholarships.description: Premier undergraduate award for students pursuing research careers in the natural sciences, engineering, and mathematics. Nominated by participating institutions.
